keepalive.h(3) Library Functions Manual keepalive.h(3)

NAME

keepalive.h - ascii-chat Client Connection Keepalive Management Interface

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int keepalive_start_thread ()
Start keepalive/ping thread. void keepalive_stop_thread ()
Stop keepalive/ping thread. bool keepalive_thread_exited ()
Check if keepalive thread has exited.

Detailed Description

ascii-chat Client Connection Keepalive Management Interface

Defines the interface for connection keepalive thread management and ping/pong coordination in the ascii-chat client.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

2025

Definition in file keepalive.h.

Function Documentation

int keepalive_start_thread ()

Start keepalive/ping thread.

Returns

0 on success, negative on error

Start keepalive/ping thread

Creates and starts the ping thread for connection keepalive. Must be called after successful server connection establishment.

Returns

0 on success, negative on error

Definition at line 236 of file keepalive.c.

236                              {
237   if (g_ping_thread_created) {
238     log_warn("Ping thread already created");
239     return 0;
240   }
241 
242   // Register keepalive atomics with named debug registry
243   static bool keepalive_atomics_registered = false;
244   if (!keepalive_atomics_registered) {
245     NAMED_REGISTER_ATOMIC(&g_ping_thread_exited, "keepalive_ping_thread_exit_confirmation", NULL);
246     keepalive_atomics_registered = true;
247   }
248 
249   // Start ping thread for keepalive
250   atomic_store_bool(&g_ping_thread_exited, false);
251   if (thread_pool_spawn(g_client_worker_pool, ping_thread_func, NULL, 3, "keepalive_ping") != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
252     log_error("Failed to spawn ping thread in worker pool");
253     LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET("Ping thread creation failed");
254     return -1;
255   }
256 
257   g_ping_thread_created = true;
258   return 0;
259 }




References ASCIICHAT_OK, atomic_store_bool(),
    g_client_worker_pool, LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET, log_error,
    log_warn, NAMED_REGISTER_ATOMIC, and
    thread_pool_spawn().


Referenced by protocol_start_connection().






void
  keepalive_stop_thread ()


Stop keepalive/ping thread. Stop keepalive/ping thread




Gracefully stops the ping thread and cleans up resources. Safe to
    call multiple times.


Definition at line 269 of file keepalive.c.


269                              {
270   if (!g_ping_thread_created) {
271     return;
272   }
273 
274   // Don't call signal_exit() here - that's for global shutdown only!
275   // The ping thread monitors connection state and will exit when connection is lost
276 
277   // Wait for thread to exit gracefully
278   int wait_count = 0;
279   while (wait_count < 20 && !atomic_load_bool(&g_ping_thread_exited)) {
280     platform_sleep_ns(100 * NS_PER_MS_INT); // 100ms
281     wait_count++;
282   }
283 
284   if (!atomic_load_bool(&g_ping_thread_exited)) {
285     log_warn("Ping thread not responding - will be joined by thread pool");
286   }
287 
288   // Thread will be joined by thread_pool_stop_all() in protocol_stop_connection()
289   g_ping_thread_created = false;
290 
291   log_debug("Ping thread stopped and joined");
292 }






References atomic_load_bool(), log_debug,
    log_warn, NS_PER_MS_INT, and platform_sleep_ns().


Referenced by protocol_stop_connection().






bool keepalive_thread_exited ()


Check if keepalive thread has exited.


Returns


true if thread exited, false otherwise


Check if keepalive thread has exited




Returns


true if thread has exited, false otherwise


Definition at line 301 of file keepalive.c.


301                                {
302   return atomic_load_bool(&g_ping_thread_exited);
303 }
